name: 光谱分析（HL：IR/NMR/MS）
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 结构 3 · 周期表与分类 Structure 3 · Classification of Matter
curriculum_points: Analyze and interpret data from mass spectrometry (MS) to determine the relative molecular mass of a compound and identify fragments to gain information about structure (AO2, AO3).

Deduce the structure of organic compounds from information provided by a combination of analytical techniques, including high resolution 1H NMR (number of signals, chemical shift, integration, and splitting patterns), infrared (IR) spectroscopy, and mass spectrometry (AO2, AO3).
